hero.title: Help Center
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know to make the most of TrouveTout224

publish.title: Post a listing
publish.desc: Click "Post a listing" at the top of the site, choose a category, add photos, a title, a description, a price, and your city. It's free and unlimited.

shop.title: Create my shop
shop.desc: Go to "Become a seller", give your shop a name, add a photo, then post your items — they'll all appear in one place, visible to all of Guinea.

contact.title: Contact a seller
contact.desc: On a listing, click "Send a message" or directly on the WhatsApp button to chat with the seller with no middleman.

report.title: Report a problem
report.desc: On the listing or profile in question, click "Report". Describe the issue and our team reviews it quickly to keep the platform safe.

password.title: Recover my password
password.desc: On the login page, click "Forgot password", enter your email, and follow the instructions to choose a new one.

faqs.q: How do I post a listing?
faqs.a: Click "Post" in the navigation bar, fill in the form with title, description, price, photos, and contact details.
Yes, posting is 100% free and unlimited. You can post as many listings as you like.

faqs.q: How do I contact a seller?
faqs.a: On a listing, click "Send a message" or the Call/WhatsApp buttons.
On the listing, click "Report this listing". Our team reviews it within 24 hours.

faqs.q: How do I delete my listing?
faqs.a: Profile → My listings → click the listing → Delete.

faqs.q: How do I change my city?
faqs.a: Click the city name in the navigation bar and choose yours.

helpBlock.title: Need help? We respond fast.
helpBlock.subtitle: Our team is available on WhatsApp and by email to support you.
